title: Notification for items to be excluded for the purpose of calculation of investment in plant & machinery of MSMEs

R1 ~ ct en'\, ~ C!ft 7TURT ~"WI<! flfUif2'1ct fcli<1T \J!Wrr, 3l~: (i) 3w:rrct ~ (~ ~┬Ę:if ~ 1ITI'1 ~ CIJI~'8114 cf; m C1ciJ <1i1 4Rqt5'i '81'i!, CITR 1R ~ ~t\if ~. en'\ 3l4qf\Jm ~ ~); ~ J.rm-x: (ii) (iii) (iv) -w=n ~ f.'i<tJifli ~; ~ ~cnx<n~cnxl MINISTRY OF SMALL SCALE INDUSTRIES NOTIFlCtiTION ┬Ę New Delhi, the 5th October, .2006 .-r ["". -.i. 4( I )/2006 <J:~<J:<1Qf1{ -;f\fu] ~ m<I>R, am 1:lfqq s.0.1722(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 7 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006(27 of 2006) herein referred to as the said Act, the Central Government hereby specifies the following items, the cost of which shall be excluded while calculating the investment in plant and machinery in the case of the enterprises mentioned in section 7(1 )(a) of the said Act, namely:- (i) equipment such as tools, jigs, dies, moulds and spare parts for maintenance and the cost of consumable stores; (ii) installation of plant and machinery; (iii) ┬Ęresearch and development equipment and pollution control equipment; (iv) power generation set and extra transformer installed by the enterprise as per the regulations of the┬Ę State Electricity Board; (v) bank charges and service charges paid to the National Small Industries Corporation or the State Small Industries Corporation; (vi) procurement or installation of cables, wiring, bus bars, electrical control panels (not mounted on individual machines), oil circuit -- 2 of 3 -- ,┬Ę reakers or miniature circuit breakers which are necessarily to be sed for providing electrical power to the plant and machinery or for afety measures; (vii) as producer plants; (viii) ansportation charges (excluding sales-tax or value added tax 1d excise duty ) for indigenous machinery from the place of their 1anufacture to the site of the enterprise; (ix) 1arges paid for technical know-how for erection of plant and 1achinery; (x) (xi) 2. While paragraph 1, machinery an the case of in value, namel~ JCh storage tanks which store raw materials and finished products nly and are not linked with the manufacturing process; and ┬Ęe fighting equipment. 3lculating the investment in plant ┬Ęand machinery referred to in he original price thereof, irrespective of whether the plant and new or second hand, shall be taken into account provided that in Jorted machinery, the following shall be included in calculating the (i) nport duty (excluding miscellaneous expenses such as ansportation from the port to the site of the factory, demurrage aid at the port); (ii) hipping charges; (iii) :ustoms clearance charges; and. (iv) ales tax or value added tax. [F. No. 4(1 )12006-MSME-Policy l JAWHAR SIRCAR,AddL Secy.
